scenario: Scenario C: Export Control Retaliation (Critical Minerals)
current_status_of_scenario: ACTIVE — China banned gallium/germanium exports to US Dec 2024
key_chips_affected: SiC power modules, GaAs radar, EV powertrains
real_world_precedent: China banned gallium/germanium/antimony to US Dec 3 2024. Gallium prices +68% since July 2023.
source_notes: USITC Executive Briefing. Stimson Center April 2025. China MOC Announcement 2023-23.

scenario: Scenario C: Export Control Retaliation (Critical Minerals)
current_status_of_scenario: ACTIVE — China banned gallium/germanium exports to US Dec 2024
key_chips_affected: GaAs wafers for RF chips, compound semiconductors
real_world_precedent: GaAs wafer exports to US fell to near-zero after July 2023 controls. PIIE analysis Oct 2024.
source_notes: China produces 94% of global gallium supply. 83% of germanium. Source: European Commission.

scenario: Scenario C: Export Control Retaliation (Critical Minerals)

key_chips_affected: Indium phosphide for photonics, GaN for power
real_world_precedent: Datacenter networking chips use InP photonics. Long substitution timeline — 3-5 years per PIIE.
source_notes: This is the slow squeeze scenario. No dramatic event — just steady constriction.
